prohibited_paths: code ownership changes without named reviewers
preconditions: checked no-claim backup-owner qualification template remains current

checked no-claim backup-ownership readiness-review template remains current and cannot be cited for owner coverage, two-person control, release authority, production authority, broad readiness, or implementation evidence

candidate backup maintainers are identified by the owner for build-critical program, architecture, security, release-operations, human-release-authority, incident-response, legal-community, support, quality, supply-chain, documentation-research, product, platform, engine, JavaScript, networking, storage, performance, accessibility, UI-runtime, agent-operations, and privacy-data scopes

each backup scope includes role level, subsystem competence, representative path coverage, recent review record, availability, succession, recusal, inactivity, removal, and emergency replacement evidence
single-owner research-phase limits remain visible and PB-019 remains blocked while backups are null, placeholders, undocumented availability, or primary-only review paths
queue status remains proposed; this specified manifest is non-executable
a named owner and named independent reviewer replace the role placeholders before this manifest can become ready
acceptance_criteria: build-critical scopes have named qualified backups or explicit checked blocked status from the backup ownership gap inventory remains

first backup-owner qualification record starts from the checked no-claim backup-owner qualification template and replaces template-only null candidate fields with real named qualified backup, role-level, subsystem-competence, path-coverage, review-record, availability, succession, recusal, inactivity, removal, emergency-replacement, reconciliation, two-person-control, and owner-review evidence

owner, reviewer, release, security, legal-community, support, incident-response, human-release-authority, quality, supply-chain, product, privacy-data, and accessibility scopes are updated consistently
CODEOWNERS, review-rule, escalation-policy, support, signing, disclosure, package, CI, service, and repository-access records are reconciled with the ownership registry

two-person control is explicit for stable signing, update trust, supported-version changes, security disclosure, irreversible profile migration, release promotion, legal approval, and incident closure

first backup ownership readiness review starts from the checked no-claim backup-ownership readiness-review template and replaces template-only null ownership_inventory, qualification_record_set, owner_reviewer, independent_reviewer, security_reviewer, release_operations_reviewer, legal_reviewer, and support_reviewer fields with owner-reviewed evidence beyond the template
PB-019 is not promoted unless backup evidence is concrete, reviewable, current, and independently verifiable
handoff docs state which scopes still rely on the primary owner and which protected paths remain ownerless or primary-only
negative_tests: do not treat a placeholder name as a qualified backup

do not cite the checked no-claim backup-owner qualification template as named backup ownership, owner coverage, two-person control, release authority, signing authority, disclosure authority, legal approval, incident closure, production authority, broad readiness, or implementation evidence

do not cite the checked no-claim backup-ownership readiness-review template as owner-reviewed backup ownership readiness, owner coverage, two-person control, release authority, signing authority, disclosure authority, legal approval, incident closure, production authority, broad readiness, or implementation evidence
do not treat CODEOWNERS routing, intent, self-nomination, undocumented availability, or title-only ownership as qualification evidence
do not promote production authority from documentation intent
do not hide single-owner residual risk
do not leave stale privileged access, ownerless protected paths, or primary-only release, signing, disclosure, support, or incident paths undocumented

rollback.strategy: Revert owner and review-rule changes if backup qualifications are not accepted.
